caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a green baseball cap leans forward toward a professional microphone in a studio filled with framed photographs and clothing racks. He is positioned in the foreground, with a black ornate chair and a white male mannequin wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and olive pants behind him. To the right, another person in a white shirt is partially visible. On-screen logos include a red and white graphic on the left and the text "REALLY TOT" in red on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man in the green shirt remains leaned over the microphone. In the final frame, a woman wearing a green t-shirt and blue jeans enters the scene from the right, standing next to the mannequin and looking toward the man.
